name: Blade of Eternal Frost
description: A longsword forged from glacial iron, perpetually cold to the touch. Those struck by its edge feel a chill seeping into the very marrow of their bones. Legend holds it was quenched in the tears of a dying frost giant.
stats: +2d6 cold damage on hit · +1 to attack rolls · Immunity to cold damage

name: Cloak of the Shadow Weave
description: Woven from the darkness between stars, this cloak wraps its wearer in living shadow. Footsteps make no sound, and even torchlight seems reluctant to illuminate its folds.
stats: Advantage on Stealth checks · Advantage on Dexterity saves · Darkvision 60ft

name: Ring of Sorcerous Amplification
description: A plain iron band inscribed with runes so small they can only be read with a jeweler's loupe. The runes form a recursive spell that feeds on itself, growing stronger with each casting.
stats: +1 to spell save DC · Spells of 3rd level or lower cost one fewer spell slot (1/day)

name: Boots of Swift Passage
description: Supple leather boots lined with the feathers of a Wind Hawk. They feel lighter with every step, as if the ground itself is eager to push you along.
stats: +10ft movement speed · Ignore difficult terrain once per short rest

name: Hammer of the Deep Forge
description: This war hammer was crafted in the deepest dwarven forge beneath the Ironspine Mountains. The head is carved from a single piece of starfall iron, still faintly warm after centuries.
stats: +2 to attack and damage · 1d6 fire damage on hit · Can cast Heat Metal 2/day

name: Potion of Giant Strength
description: A murky amber liquid that smells of old oak and iron. When consumed, the drinker's veins fill with the might of a hill giant for one hour.

name: Amulet of the Warding Flame
description: A filigree amulet containing a sliver of phoenix feather suspended in enchanted resin. The flame inside it has never been seen to flicker.
stats: Resistance to fire damage · +2 to saving throws vs spells

name: Quarterstaff of the Elder Grove
description: Cut from a tree struck by lightning in the heart of the Moonwood. The wood is unnaturally smooth and hums with a low frequency only druids can hear.
stats: +1 to attack and damage · Can cast Speak with Plants at will · Entangle 1/day

name: Cursed Gauntlets of Greed
description: Beautifully gilded gauntlets that grip anything placed in them with supernatural strength. The catch: the wearer cannot willingly release anything they pick up without a DC 15 Wisdom save.
stats: +4 to grapple checks · Must succeed DC 15 WIS save to release any held object

name: Iron Rations (1 week)
description: Hard tack, dried meat, and salted vegetables. Not pleasant, but keeps a traveller alive through a week of hard marching.

name: Tome of Lost Spells
description: A water-damaged spellbook recovered from a sunken library. Several pages are illegible, but three spells remain intact — their school and level unclear until studied.
stats: Contains 3 random spells (GM determines) · 200 blank pages remaining

name: Obsidian Arrow Set (20)
description: Twenty arrows tipped with volcanic obsidian, sharper than steel and capable of piercing most natural armour. Fragile — each breaks on impact.
stats: +1 damage · Ignores natural armour (hides, scales) · Single use per arrow
